prompt:
I need to send this to the CTO. It's an email about our on-call situation. Right now it's a bit of a wall of text and I think it's going to get ignored. Help.

[On-call burden causing attrition risk, EMEA hiring decision needed]

assertions.description: Output contains all four exec frame sections: What matters, Why now, Risk if we do nothing, Recommendation
Output mentions attrition / engineers considering leaving — the highest-stakes signal in the original
Recommendation specifically asks for a decision on EMEA hiring, not just a vague escalation
Output does not enumerate the three root causes (alerting configuration, runbooks, staffing) in detail — that's operational noise
Output preserves the payments service / critical system risk — this is the concrete stake, not just operational color
